message:
fix: use stable subscriber IDs in pollingManager to prevent stale callback accumulation (#3382) (#3385)

Replace the Set<() => void> subscriber collection with a Map<number, () => void>
keyed by auto-incrementing IDs. This ensures unsubscribe always removes the
correct entry regardless of callback reference identity, preventing duplicate
refetch calls that accumulated when React effects re-ran due to dependency
changes or StrictMode double-mount.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
